# Fixture Capability Map

- `rust_project`: Rust defs, funcs, imports, macros, traits, whole-file matches.
- `python_project`: Python classes, funcs, imports, strings, comments.
- `react_project`: React components, hooks, props, JSX elements.
- `mixed_project`: Multi-language discovery, path filters, extension filtering.
- `malformed`: Invalid UTF-8, syntax errors, binary detection, truncated files.
- `edge_cases`: Hidden files, unicode names, uppercase extensions, spacing in names.
- `sql_generic`: Generic SQL dialect behavior.
- `sql_postgres`: Postgres-specific SQL detection and predicates.
- `sql_mysql`: MySQL-specific SQL detection and predicates.
- `sql_sqlite`: SQLite-specific SQL detection and predicates.
